themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "But for his kin, that is near unto him, that is, for his mother, and for his father, and for...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַקָּרֹ֖ב: that is near - near (in place, kindred or time)".
